title: Cocoa Creamy Almond Soup
description: A nutty, creamy soup perfect for sick-day cravings, inspired by traditional Saudi Arabian dishes and suitable as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat almond milk in a saucepan over medium heat until simmering.
Stir in cocoa powder and butter, reducing heat to low. Cook for about 5 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly.
Whisk in vanilla extract and heavy cream. Continue cooking and whisking for an additional 3-4 minutes until well combined and creamy.
Season with a pinch of salt. Taste test; adjust seasoning as needed.
